entity.summary: Omnichain decentralized exchange centered on order-book trading, trading APIs, liquidity incentives, and cross-chain exchange infrastructure.
entity.notes: HEI models the CoinGecko exchange row and DefiLlama Dexalot DEX row as one entity. Current first-party documentation links the live exchange, trading APIs, smart contracts, liquidity incentives, and omnichain exchange features.

evidence.title: Dexalot Knowledge Hub
evidence.notes: First-party documentation links the live exchange and documents trading APIs, smart contracts, liquidity incentives, fees, and omnichain exchange components.

evidence.title: Dexalot exchange application
evidence.notes: Current first-party exchange application remains available and is linked directly from official Dexalot documentation.

evidence.title: Dexalot exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Secondary exchange registry corroborates Dexalot as an exchange venue; HEI consolidates the separate DEX registry row into the same entity.
